sections.popular-quotations:
Zhuge Xing said, “The Southland stands in peril. Should we not avoid disaster ourselves?”His tears falling, Zhang Ti said, “The Southland is undone, as any fool can tell. But if liege and liefe men surrendered together withou a single man dying for the kingdom in its final hour, how unbearable the shame would be!”
			Romance of the Three Kingdoms: Chapter 120

full_text:
Zhang Ti (Juxian) 張悌 (巨先)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Ti (張悌), styledJuxian (巨先). Wu’s last Prime Minister. Refused surrender to Jin and marched out to die on the battlefield. Zhang Ti was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zhang Ti lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
